name: Fried Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples well with cold water.
2. Remove the cores of the apples using an apple corer.
3. Slice the apples into 1/2-inch rings.
4. Pour the water and butter into a large skillet.
5. Warm over medium heat until the butter melts.
6. Add the apple slices to the skillet and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Sprinkle with brown sugar and lemon juice.
8. Turn the apples to mix evenly.
9. Cover the skillet and remove from the heat.
10. Let sit for 10 minutes before serving.
Yield: 4-6 servings
